displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #17
synopsis: As Battle of Eriadu continues, the leader of the resistance, Jedi Knight Farzala Tarabal is faced with an impossible decision: risk the lives of his friends, or forfeit their chances of defeating the Nihil. It’s a dilemma that sees Farzala descend to a dark place, only to discover a surprising confidant. • The climactic final battle between the Jedi and the Nihil that has been years in the making. • Ongoing series.
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #17
